_publications._publicationTitle: NF106: A Neurofibromatosis Clinical Trials Consortium Phase II Trial of the MEK Inhibitor Mirdametinib (PD-0325901) in Adolescents and Adults With NF1-Related Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Mean ratings of worst tumor pain intensity decreased significantly in the total sample from baseline to course 4 ( P  = .0075), with both PR and no-PR groups showing a similar trend toward less pain (almost two mean points lower, suggesting clinically meaningful change ).
details: Mean ratings of worst tumor pain intensity decreased significantly in the total sample from baseline to course 4 (P = .0075), with both PR and no-PR groups showing similar trend toward less pain (almost two mean points lower, suggesting clinically meaningful change)
